Home Specs Tasks Getting Started

khazana

A personal, self-curating intelligence surface for one founder: it pulls the world's best signal into one normalized feed, ranks it to the founder's taste, and writes original interactive long-form blogs in the founder's voice — all static + serverless at $0 recurring cost.

Current sprint: 3 of 11.
